candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; matches reported sales values and is preferable to non-revenue operating income or balance-sheet deferred revenue.
Balance-sheet liability, not revenue recognized in the income statement.
Explicitly non-revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit income-statement revenue line.

Candidate list was empty. Selected 'Handelsvaror' from the A-column preview because it is the most plausible direct cost/cost of sales line item and sits between revenue and overhead expenses. Manual review recommended because the label is in Swedish and could require confirmation as COGS/cost of goods sold.

Candidate list was empty. No explicit SG&A total row is present, so selected the best apparent overhead component rows from the A-column preview: 'Övriga externa kostnader' and 'Personalkostnader'. Excluded COGS ('Handelsvaror') and all depreciation/amortization rows. Manual review recommended because the labels are in Swedish and overhead classification may vary by issuer.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is amortization, not current R&D expense, and XSGA/XRD rules exclude amortization lines.
Balance-sheet asset capitalization, not an income-statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: No clear standalone R&D expense line exists in the provided statements. Candidate items are not valid XRD expense rows.

candidates.why: Most specific and preferred interest-expense line item.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific subcomponent of interest expense, not the preferred all-in interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental subcomponent, not the main reported interest expense line.

variables.notes: Used candidate 'Interest Expense' as the preferred line. Added 'Finansiella kostnader' as a fallback because 2025 appears to report the broader finance-cost label instead of a populated standalone interest-expense line. Includes minority interest, which would double count if MIB is also mapped separately.

variables.notes: Selected 'Total Equity' because it appears to exclude minority interest and therefore pairs correctly with separate MIB mapping.
